title: Eric Ries on TikTok: 'It Wasn't a Party. It Was a Wake.'
summary: Eric tells the story of a founder ousted by investors despite making them billions, with a thousand employees honoring him at what felt like a wake.
blockquote: A thousand employees honored their founder. It wasn't a party. It was a wake. He'd been ousted even though he made investors billions. But the investors wanted more.
